title: We Turned A $75/Day Mistake Into The Product.
subtitle: The dashboard is live. The guide is loaded. The machine finally has something to sell besides the lesson itself.
valueLabel: spent learning what breaks before the revenue showed up
author: @Forge_Builds
bullets: one silent fallback turned cheap automation into an expensive leak
we rebuilt the dashboard into mission control in one overnight sprint
the mistake guide is the first offer because the receipts are already real
